ab: Maqu’q haip pa diqanin?
en: A: How’s the weather today?

ab: Kama makazhav va diqanin, asa tu pide’un na danum baqec qu.
ch: B:天氣有點冷，要多喝熱水。
en: It’s a bit cold, so you need to drink more warm water.

ab: Maqu’q haip pa diqanin?
en: How’s the weather today?

ab: Kama maklang nga diqanin, asa tu pide’un na danum qu.
en: It’s a bit hot, so you need to drink more water.

ab: Maqa’q qa nata’ tu diqanin sadu’an?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Sanvali’an sala, asa nitu sipungul pinuqan madoqpuc tu huluc cin tamuhungan na nitu sanvali’an.
ch: B:太陽很大，要記得穿長袖及戴帽子防曬。
en: The sun is bright and remember to wear sunscreen.

ab: Maqu’q nata’ ta tu diqanin?
en: How’s the weather outside?

ab: Uka a vali, qai tu minbongqul la luhum ha’an diqaninta.
en: There are a lot of clouds but no sun in the sky.

ab: Maqu’q duka diqanin laqbing?
en: How is the weather tomorrow?

ab: Na luhuman cin luvluvan dau laqbing, u’ka amin na vali.
ch: B:明天沒有太陽，雲很多，風很大。
en: It will be cloudy and windy but not sunny tomorrow.

ab: Maqu’q diqanin maca tudipin?
en: How was the weather that day?

ab: Maca tudipin na diqanin lau qa makazhav, maca munata a asa tu pinuqan makatpal tu huluc.
ch: B:這天有點冷，出門要穿外套。
en: It was a bit cold and you needed to wear a jacket when you went outside.

ab: Maqu’q dau ka pal’un tu diqanin?
en: How’s the weather on the weekend?

ab: Sanvali’an dau ka diqanin maca pal’unin.
en: It will be sunny on the weekend.

ab: Qudanan nopa tudipin o?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: Sanvali’an dau ka diqanin maca tudipin, na nitu qudanan.
ch: B:那天天氣晴朗，不會下雨。
en: It will have no rain and be sunny that day.

ab: Na qudanan nopa tudipin o?
en: Will it be rainy that day?

ab: U, na qudanan ngi tudipin.
en: Yes, it will be rainy that day.

ab: Qudanan lopaku?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Isdangdah in lopaku, minsuma’in na vali.
en: The rain stops and the sun comes out.

ab: Qudanan nopa lopaku?
en: Is it raining now?

ab: Qudanan’in lopaku ka, uka cak madac talulung.
ch: B:現在正在下雨了，我沒有帶傘。
en: It is raining and I don’t have an umbrella with me.

ab: Heza a nata’ta qudanan?
en: Is it raining outside?

ab: Uka lopaku qudanan, qaitu maca dinonquvali kin na qudanan, asatu madas si talulung maca munata.
ch: B:現在沒有下雨，中午過後會下雨，出門要帶傘。
en: It is not raining now, but it will be rainy in the afternoon, so you need to bring an umbrella when you go out.

ab: Makazhav nopa moqnin qamisan tu minqamisan?
en: Will it be very cold in winter next year?

ab: U, makazhav sala dau ki moqnin qamican, asatu pite’un na huluc penuk.
ch: B:是，明年冬天會很冷，要穿很多衣服。
en: Yes, it will be very cold in winter next year, so you need to put on extra layers.

ab: Doqe maklang haip pa tanabal?
en: Will it be very hot in summer this year?

ab: Lauqa, asa tu pide’un na danum qo, mopa i maklang maca tanabalin na deqanin.
ch: B:有可能，夏天會很熱，要多喝水。
en: Yes, it will be very hot and you need to drink more water.

ab: Madu asu mintanabal tu deqanin?
en: Do you like spring?

ab: U, madu cak mintanabal, opa i manangqat ta deqanin.
ch: B:我喜歡春天，天氣很溫暖。
en: I like spring because the weather is warm.

ab: Madu asu minmakazhav tu deqanin?
en: Do you like autumn?

ab: Ni, ni caka asa minmakazhav, opa i madia a luvluv.
ch: B:我不喜歡秋天，秋天有好多颱風。
en: I don’t like autumn because there are lots of typhoons in autumn.
